name: Recurly
description: Monitor Recurly subscription billing platform for account access and payment data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Recurly at https://app.recurly.com
2. Go to Admin → Integrations → API Credentials
3. Copy your Private API Key
4. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with trailing colon): echo -n 'apikey:' | base64
5. Enter your subdomain and encoded key below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'your_api_key:' (with trailing colon). Found in Recurly Admin → Integrations → API Credentials. Command: echo -n 'apikey:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Recurly users with access to subscription billing data
